Flow.description: Updated email templates- 8.22.24 Updated Org62 Oppty link and region fields - 4.21.24

formulas.name: GPS_Body_Formula
GPS_HTML_Body
formulas.expression:
"" & "You have been assigned a project. Please provide sales rationale
"& "Click Here" & ""

formulas.name: GPS_Subject_Formula

Flow.interviewLabel: GPS AE/SE Notification of New Project {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: GPS AE/SE Notification of New Project

textTemplates.name: GNG_Complete_Email_Body_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
Thank you {!$Record.AE__r.FirstName} {!$Record.AE__r.LastName} and {!$Record.SE__r.FirstName} {!$Record.SE__r.LastName} for completing the request for RFx support. We are currently reviewing your request and will respond with next steps.


Project Name: {!$Record.avnio__ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}{!Get_Project}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Questions Due Date: {!$Record.Questions_Due_Date__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

Go/No-Go Score: {!$Record.GNG_score__c}

textTemplates.name: GNG_Reminder_Email_Body_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
Reminder: {!$Record.AE__r.FirstName} {!$Record.AE__r.LastName} and {!$Record.SE__r.FirstName} {!$Record.SE__r.LastName} we need to keep things moving as the RFx team supports a high volume of RFx. We see that your GNG is in process and has yet to be completed. GNG is to be completed within 2 business days of the release of the RFx. As this day has passed, your request is at risk and we may not be able to support you. Please complete your GNG within 1 business day of this notification.


cc: @{!$Record.GPS_AE_Manager__r.Email} @{!$Record.SE_Manager_User__r.Email}


Project Name: {!$Record.avnio__ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

textTemplates.name: New_Project_Email_Body_Template
textTemplates.text:
Thank you {!$Record.AE__r.FirstName} {!$Record.AE__r.LastName} for initiating a request for RFx support. We are eager to support you.


{!$Record.AE__r.FirstName} {!$Record.AE__r.LastName} and {!$Record.SE__r.FirstName} {!$Record.SE__r.LastName}, please continue to complete your Go/No Go (GNG) by selecting the below linked Project Name in GPS Utopia and selecting the Go/No Go Determination button on the top right of the screen.


IMPORTANT for the SE (if identified): The Bill of Materials (BOM) question is part of the GNG. As part of the GNG process, a Security Specialist may also be reviewing the GNG. Note: Security Review is not required for RFIs as part of GNG. Please review the AE's completed GNG and provide comments for each GNG question.


The GNG needs to be fully completed within 2 business days of the release of the RFx documents. Once completed, we typically respond to your request within 1 business day or less. Should you have any questions in completing the GNG, please see Getting to Know Go/No Go and the GPS Utopia enablement guide. You may also contact us via the RFx Intake Questions flow in the #gps-rfx-team slack channel.



Project Name: {!$Record.avnio__ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Questions Due Date:{!$Record.Questions_Due_Date__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}
